name: Oban
method: empirical secondary-port offset: mean(Oban actual - Tobermory model)
calibrated_from: tidetimes.org.uk Oban vs tobermory.json, 27-30 Jun 2026 (3 days, 11 events)
note: Time offset varies ~13-30 min with spring/neap; height offset stable to +/-0.03 m. Kayak-grade, not for navigation.
